item.name: Island Adenium Whistle
item.description: This whistle emits a florid tone that calls your island adenium to bear you forth like the floweriest of steeds.

mount.name: Island Adenium
mount.action: Summon forth your island adenium. Literally a desert rose by another name, and doesn't have much of a scent to brag about.
mount.description: Sprouted and grown in the South Mandra Kingdom, this adenium lived what he thought was a happy life until he encountered the Peerifool. From the castaway vegetable, he learned about the great wide world beyond the island's bounds, and began to dream of embarking upon grand adventures.
mount.tooltip:
I have oft heard it said that a blossom's beauty
can move a man to love and long, but I never truly
believed it until I met you two desert roses.
- Thancred
